get.description: 高级开发特性。该组路由用于观察和管理 Background Job Runtime 中的核心资产备份作业，主要面向开发、调试、运维和自动化工具。

post.description: 高级开发特性。该组路由用于观察和管理 Background Job Runtime 中的核心资产备份作业，主要面向开发、调试、运维和自动化工具。
高级开发特性。该组路由用于导出 TavernHeadless 核心资产备份、执行 restore preview，以及把恢复任务写入 Background Job Runtime。请求体固定为 JSON，不提供 multipart 上传。 该接口只负责入队。导出完成后需要通过 /backup-jobs/:id/file 下载 .thbackup 文件。
post.summary: Create core asset backup export job

post.description: 高级开发特性。该组路由用于导出 TavernHeadless 核心资产备份、执行 restore preview，以及把恢复任务写入 Background Job Runtime。请求体固定为 JSON，不提供 multipart 上传。 v1 只支持 create_copy。真正的写库、ID 重映射和 runtime state 重建会在后台 worker 中完成。

data.description: 已解析的 .thbackup JSON 文档对象。

get.description: Internal observation endpoint. against=floor:<id> compares two floor snapshots; against=live compares live head vs floor snapshot. include_values=true opt-in returns raw value bodies.
get.summary: Diff a floor snapshot against another floor or live

get.description: Internal observation endpoint. Mirrors SessionStateService.evaluateReplaySafetyForFloor.
get.summary: Evaluate session-state replay blockers for a floor

get.description: Internal observation endpoint. Returns metadata only; the full value is not returned in the list endpoint.
Internal observation endpoint. Returns the full snapshot value for one slot.
get.summary: Get a single floor snapshot with full value

patch.description: Updates topology-only fields on a floor: `floor_no`, `branch_id`, `parent_floor_id`. The runtime fields `state`, `token_in`, `token_out` are intentionally not patchable through this endpoint. Mutating them directly would bypass the floor run state machine and the commit-time token bookkeeping, which would corrupt downstream truth (history, branch ancestry, prompt budget). If a request body contains any restricted field, the endpoint responds with 400 `floor_patch_restricted_field`. If a request body mixes a restricted field with a topology field, the response is 400 `floor_patch_mixed_fields` and is rejected as a whole.

get.description: Returns prompt runtime facts that were actually persisted when this floor was committed. It never re-runs prompt assembly, macro evaluation, or budget decisions. If the floor was committed before the explain snapshot feature existed, resolved policy, source map, trim reasons, excluded sources, and section stats may be returned as null.

limitations: Memory is branch-aware. Current limitations center on page-local proposal / promotion coverage for older committed floors and legacy fallback rows.

get.summary: Explain committed floor prompt runtime from persisted truth

post.description: Retry generation for an existing committed floor in place. The target floor must be in the 'committed' state. The current output page and assistant message are cleared, the floor is reset, and a new generation attempt is run under the same floor id. This endpoint is not a recovery path for failed floors.

get.description: Returns the session-base ToolPermissions snapshot stored in metadata_json.tool_permissions. This route does not expose future run/node/step overlays.

patch.description: Applies a partial update to the session-base ToolPermissions object in metadata_json.tool_permissions. slot_allow_list and slot_deny_list merge by slot key. This route does not define future run/node/step overlays.
patch.summary: Partial update session base tool permissions

put.description: Replaces the session-base ToolPermissions object stored in metadata_json.tool_permissions. This route does not define future run/node/step overlays.

get.description: Returns the session-level runtime tool catalog snapshot for the session. It does not expose future run/node/step permission overlays, which only participate when specific executions are prepared.
Session-state internal observation endpoint. Not wrapped by @tavern/sdk or @tavern/client-helpers.
get.summary: List managed domain bindings for a session

get.description: Internal observation endpoint. Returns metadata only; the full value is not returned in the list endpoint.
get.summary: List live head metadata for a session

get.description: Internal observation endpoint. Returns the full resolved value, source-floor-aware when requested.
get.summary: Resolve the live value for a single slot

get.description: Internal observation endpoint. Returns summaries with payload_preview and payload_size_bytes only; the full value is not returned here.
Internal observation endpoint. Returns full payload for a single mutation.
get.summary: Get a single session-state mutation with full payload

get.description: Public read surface for Session State diffs. Returns full values for public-stable slots.
get.summary: Diff public Session State values against live or another floor

get.description: Public read surface for floor snapshot values of public-stable Session State slots.
get.summary: Read public Session State floor snapshots

get.description: Public read surface for Session State. Returns public-stable built-in slot definitions plus registered custom namespaces.
get.summary: List public session-state namespaces and slot definitions

post.description: Control-plane write surface for creating a per-session custom namespace registration and managed binding.
post.summary: Register a custom Session State namespace

get.description: Public read surface for resolving current-effective or source-floor Session State values.

delete.description: Public delete surface for registered custom namespaces. Maps delete to governed `present: false` and returns the current-effective single-slot view.
delete.summary: Delete a custom Session State value

post.description: Public write surface for registered custom namespaces. Performs governed direct write and returns the current-effective single-slot view.
post.summary: Write a custom Session State value
